ownership_contract.task_goal: Implement App-only runtime supervisor and fail-closed batch for App #257/#258/#259.
ownership_contract.validation_expectation: loom doctor --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; loom fact-chain --target . --json; npm run typecheck; npm run smoke; npm run smoke:packaged; git diff --check
ownership_contract.output_format: Worker handoff with worktree, branch, HEAD, git status, changed files, validation results, covered issues, and residual risk.
ownership_contract.integration_target: Main controller PR integration for App #257/#258/#259.

integration_evidence.summary: Electron main supervises configured local Core/Harbor runtime commands and probes health/admission through preload IPC.
Task Thread and Browser/identity surfaces fail closed when live runtime or live identity facts are unavailable.
Library/SiteSkill projections keep fixture/demo metadata visible but mark it demo-only, stale, and not launchable unless live Core task evidence and the runtime supervisor gate are both ready.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: loom verify reports suite validation is not required for this installed-state; this worker records local validation and item-specific carrier evidence.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Main controller may run stronger hosted gates during PR integration.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Before PR creation or after any code/carrier diff.
